case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ROSA EMILIA SOLARES PEREZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,902.13 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROSA EMILIA SOLARES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2020 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED DEC-02-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROSA EMILIA SOLARES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC., REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROSA EMILIA SOLARES PEREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
